title: File uploader component edit fails due to large page size
symptom: When attempting to edit the file uploader component on a large page, the error 'Current page is too large' is displayed.
not_this_if: Editing on a blank page or a page with fewer elements
root_cause: The editing functionality for the file uploader component is limited by the size and complexity of the current page. When the page has too many elements, it may exceed the processing capacity of the AI editing tool.
fix_steps: Navigate to a blank page or a page with fewer elements
Attempt to edit the file uploader component again
agent_instruction: Switch to a blank page to edit the file uploader component successfully.
